boxDescription: To remove the fuse block cover, press the clips on the cover and lift it straight up.

fuses.description: (APO - IP/CNSL) Auxiliary Power Outlet - Instrument Panel/Console
(APO - CNSL) Auxiliary Power Outlet - Floor Console
(RAP/ ACCY RLY) Retained Accessory Power/ Accessory Relay

boxDescription: The instrument panel fuse block is located in the center console between the driver and passenger seats. To access the fuses, open the fuse panel door from the passenger side by pulling it out.

fuses.description: (PASS DR WDO SW) Passenger Door Window Switch

fuses.description: (SADS MDL) Semi Active Damping System Module
(EOCM/ SBZA) External Object Calculating Module/ Side Blind Zone Alert
(PASS DR PWR SEAT) Passenger/Driver Power Seats

boxDescription: The rear compartment fuse block is located in the cargo area, on the driver side of the vehicle behind the lower trim panel. To open, turn the latch with a flat bladed tool and pull the trim panel from the edges to fold it down.
